title: iOS Shortcuts
subtitle: Automatically log expenses from Apple Pay
description: Use iOS Shortcuts to log your Apple Pay payments directly in SmartSpend. When you make a payment, the shortcut will open SmartSpend with the payment data pre-filled.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1: You make a payment with Apple Pay
howItWorks.step3: SmartSpend opens with the payment data
howItWorks.step4: You review and save the transaction

auto.title: Automatic (Wallet)
auto.description: Create an automation that logs every Apple Pay payment directly in SmartSpend.

steps.1: Open the Shortcuts app on your iPhone
steps.3: Select your card(s) and tap Next
steps.6: Amount and merchant are passed automatically from Wallet

auto.note: Requires iOS 17.2+ and cards compatible with Wallet notifications (Apple Card, compatible banks).

manual.title: Manual (Siri)
manual.description: Create a shortcut you can run manually or with Siri after each payment.

steps.1: Open the Shortcuts app on your iPhone
steps.2: Tap + to create a new shortcut
steps.5: Type your expense in natural text
steps.7: Now you can say: "Hey Siri, log expense"

tips.title: Tips
tips.smartCategory: SmartSpend automatically detects the category based on your transaction history and the merchant name.
tips.siri: Name your shortcut something short like "Log expense" to easily activate it with Siri.
tips.widget: Add the shortcut to your home screen as a widget for quick access.

quickAdd.title: Payment detected
quickAdd.subtitle: Would you like to add it?
quickAdd.budgetRemaining: You'll have {{amount}} left in {{category}} this month.
quickAdd.budgetWillExceed: You'll exceed your {{category}} budget this month.
